## Summary
- describe the change
- call out any security or operational impact

## Validation
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Relevant manual verification completed

## Secure Delivery Checklist
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private environment values were committed
- [ ] New dependencies were necessary and reviewed
- [ ] Authentication, authorization, or data-handling changes were reviewed for risk
- [ ] Docs, examples, and sample payloads avoid sensitive or real customer data
